expectations.text: Response generates Organization JSON-LD with sameAs array
expectations.evidence: Organization schema includes sameAs array with Twitter, LinkedIn, and GitHub URLs.

expectations.text: Response generates WebSite JSON-LD with SearchAction
expectations.evidence: WebSite schema includes potentialAction with @type SearchAction, target URL with {search_term_string}, and query-input. However, uses the older flat target string format rather than the EntryPoint type structure.
All URLs use absolute format: https://buildstack.dev, https://buildstack.dev/images/logo.svg. Explicitly notes logo URL must be absolute.

expectations.text: Response shows integration in TanStack Start root layout
expectations.evidence: Shows integration in src/routes/__root.tsx using createRootRoute with script tags containing JSON.stringify of schemas. Also mentions head() export as an alternative but does not show its implementation.
